phrases.example: What stands out most is how calm he is.
He tends to speak quietly, even when he's stressed.

phrases.text: If I had to sum it up…
phrases.example: If I had to sum it up, it’s convenient but noisy.
Compared to my old area, it feels much greener.
It’s located right by the station.
From what I’ve noticed, mornings are the busiest.
A typical day looks like classes, then study time.
The biggest drawback is the traffic.
On the plus side, everything is within walking distance.
In general, I’d say it suits families.
